title: Hebraios #1445
definition:
1) Hebrew
    1a) any one of the Jewish or Israelitish nations
 2) in a narrower sense, those who live in Palestine and use the
    language of the country
 3) all Jewish Christians, whether they spoke Aramaic or Greek
